title: Formula column for automations (date column)

posts.author: pablo.matanzo (Pablo Matanzo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to make an automation from a formula column ??
I´ve created a formula for Due dates, and need to send emails based on this date. But it doesn´t let me.

FORMAT_DATE(ADD_DAYS({Services Date},{Net 30/60..}), "DD - MM - YY")

I have paid Pro plan for all my employees and I do not find the way for doing this basic thing.
If it not works I will go back to Standard plan

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi you need to instal General Caster App by @Thomas-Omnitas

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml: General Caster is not our app it is done by @rob and the team at Omnidea.

posts.author: pablo.matanzo (Pablo Matanzo)
posts.cookedHtml:
It works @hlopezvc!!
It´s incredible that we need a 3rd app for such an easy task…
Thanks a lot!

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for clarifying… my mistake.
But the name started with “omni”

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
